title: Recursive Summarization of Nested Documents
scenario: Write a prompt that generates a recursive summary of a nested document with multiple levels of hierarchy, where each level summarizes the previous one. The document is a JSON object with key-value pairs, where each value is either a string or another JSON object.
constraints: Must be under 50 lines of code
Must use a recursive function to generate the summary

evaluationCriteria.description: Does the generated code adhere to the constraints of being under 50 lines of code and using a recursive function?
Does the generated code produce the correct recursive summary of the nested document?
Is the generated code readable and well-formatted?
